checks.method: Compare the page, README, quickstart, case study, roadmap, phase status, changelog, version history, and records with the verified v0.47 evidence.
evidence: Owner-approved regions are stated as prototype evidence, not independent ground truth
Dataset, split, baseline, and model are explicit null values

checks.reason: The coherent candidate must be reviewed, merged, repeated from fresh main, and remotely tag-verified before shipment.
Issue #540 explicitly selects a local-only artifact and authorizes no deployment or public-sharing change.

truth_surfaces.expected_state: BurnLens 0.47.0 remains the verified release and 0.48.0 is a candidate.
P2O4-T36 U01-U05 pass and U06 release verification remains active.
Open milestone issue with release gates pending.
truth_surfaces.observed_state: Issue exists and owns the active branch.

limitations: The labels are owner-approved prototype evidence, not independent ground truth.
Six events satisfy only the frozen count minimum; the separate sufficiency evaluator has not passed.
Dataset, split, baseline, and model versions remain null.
No GitHub Release, deployment, public-sharing change, or operational application exists.

decision.rationale: All pre-merge technical, package, render, reproducibility, privacy, and claim gates pass. PR, merge, fresh-main repetition, and remote tag verification remain required.
decision.next_action: Open one coherent milestone PR, merge it after checks pass, repeat release verification from exact main, then create and verify the annotated tag.
